nasb.text: I will also cut off the inhabitant from Ashdod, And him who holds the scepter, from Ashkelon; I will even unleash My power upon Ekron, And the remnant of the Philistines will perish,” Says the Lord God.

esv.text: I will cut off the inhabitants from Ashdod, and him who holds the scepter from Ashkelon; I will turn my hand against Ekron, and the remnant of the Philistines shall perish,” says the Lord God.

cnv.text: 我必剪除亞實突的居民， 以及亞實基倫掌權的領袖； 我必伸手攻擊以革倫， 把餘剩的非利士人都滅絕。’ 這是主耶和華說的。

ccb.text: 我要铲除亚实突的居民和亚实基伦的掌权者， 伸手攻击以革伦， 剩下的非利士人都要灭亡。 这是主耶和华说的。”
